name: Blobby Clicker
author: Poki
description: Blobby Clicker is an idle clicker game in which you raise your own Blobby! Blobby is a friendly character who gives you money the more you click on him. You can use this money to buy upgrades for your Blobby to make each click even more valuable. The more you click on Blobby, the more items you unlock for him. You can get different types of fur, get some cool hats and gain access to different locations for Blobby to live in. Can you raise the ultimate Blobby? How to play Blobby Clicker? Use the mouse to click on Blobby! Who created Blobby Clicker? Blobby Clicker is created by 9Lives Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Blobby Clicker for free? You can play Blobby Clicker for free on Poki. Can I play Blobby Clicker on mobile devices and desktop? Blobby Clicker can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
